hyperedges.label: Gajakeshari Yoga Formation Condition
Kalanidhi Yoga — Jupiter-Venus-Mercury Trio
Strongest Raja Yoga — 9th and 10th Lord Conjunction
Sunapha-Anapha-Duradhura Lunar Yoga Triad
Vesi-Vosi-Ubhayachari Solar Yoga Triad
Shrinatha Yoga — 7th Lord Exalted in 10th with 9th-10th Conjunction
Cancer Ascendant — Mars as Full Yoga Karaka (4th and 5th Lord)
Taurus Ascendant — Saturn as Raja Yoga Karaka (9th and 10th Lord)
Nine-Planet Natural Friendship Network
Dhana Yoga — Venus in 5th own sign + Mars in 11th
Maharaja Yoga — Exchange + Karaka Combination
Koorma Yoga — Dual Condition for Benefics and Malefics
Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga Group: Five planets in own/exaltation in Kendra
Viparita Raja Yoga Cluster: Harsha + Sarala + Vimala (dusthana lords in dusthanas give excellent results per Mantreswara; Parasara disagrees)
Five Types of Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga (Mantreswara Ch.7 vv.26-30)
Ascendant-Specific Yogakarakas: Saturn for Taurus/Libra, Mars for Cancer/Leo, Venus for Capricorn/Aquarius
Ashtakavarga System: Bindu accumulation, Trikona Sodhana, Ekadhipatya Sodhana, Sarvashtakavarga

nodes.norm_label: saturn malefic effect: loans, unwanted expenditure, disease, displacement/transfer, fight with wife, destruction of property, danger to life

nodes.norm_label: sade sati: 7.5-year saturn transit over 12th, 1st, 2nd from natal moon (90 months)

nodes.label: Janma Sani: Saturn in 1st from Moon (middle 2.5 yrs of Sade Sati) - the WORST/most malefic Saturn transit, dangerous to life
nodes.norm_label: janma sani: saturn in 1st from moon (middle 2.5 yrs of sade sati) - the worst/most malefic saturn transit, dangerous to life

nodes.label: Ardhashtama Sani (Kantaka/Laghu Kalyani): Saturn in 4th from Moon - harassment, poverty, paralysis/wind disease, separation from wife
nodes.norm_label: ardhashtama sani (kantaka/laghu kalyani): saturn in 4th from moon - harassment, poverty, paralysis/wind disease, separation from wife

nodes.label: Kantaka Sani: Saturn in 7th from Moon - worse than 4th; danger to wife, demotion, loss of status/respect
nodes.norm_label: kantaka sani: saturn in 7th from moon - worse than 4th; danger to wife, demotion, loss of status/respect

nodes.label: Ashtama Sani (Kalyani): Saturn in 8th from Moon - trouble equivalent to death; next worst after Sade Sati
nodes.norm_label: ashtama sani (kalyani): saturn in 8th from moon - trouble equivalent to death; next worst after sade sati

nodes.label: Saturn in 9th from Moon: Tamil texts say Raja Yoga/aristocratic comforts, Sanskrit texts say bad (Pithru Samah Nithya Dukham) - net moderate
nodes.norm_label: saturn in 9th from moon: tamil texts say raja yoga/aristocratic comforts, sanskrit texts say bad (pithru samah nithya dukham) - net moderate

nodes.norm_label: saturn sade sati rounds: mangu (dull, 1st round), pongu (fertile, 2nd), kungu (depressing, 3rd), marana (death-inflicting, 3rd/4th)

nodes.label: Anga Sani: Sade Sati distributed across body parts - first 2.5 yrs Head, second 2.5 yrs Heart (worst), last 2.5 yrs Feet
nodes.norm_label: anga sani: sade sati distributed across body parts - first 2.5 yrs head, second 2.5 yrs heart (worst), last 2.5 yrs feet

nodes.label: Sage Pulippani rule: Sade Sati worst for Chara (movable) rasis - especially Kataka (Cancer); lesser for Sthira (Simha, Vrischika); Ubhaya rasis unaffected except Janma Sani
nodes.norm_label: sage pulippani rule: sade sati worst for chara (movable) rasis - especially kataka (cancer); lesser for sthira (simha, vrischika); ubhaya rasis unaffected except janma sani

nodes.norm_label: rahu benefic effect (3,6,11): money from many sources, victory over enemies, cure of disease, gain through outside/widow women, respect

nodes.norm_label: rahu malefic effect: undiagnosable diseases, food poisoning, black magic, scandal via widow, bad for parents, loss, danger to life in 8th

nodes.norm_label: ketu malefic transit houses from moon = 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 12 (8th as bad as rahu)

nodes.label: Ketu benefic effect (3,6,11): victory over enemies, income up, name & fame, courage, aristocrat life (Raja Yoga), spiritual sharpness
nodes.norm_label: ketu benefic effect (3,6,11): victory over enemies, income up, name & fame, courage, aristocrat life (raja yoga), spiritual sharpness

nodes.label: Ketu malefic effect: mental worry, small pox/skin disease, enmity with co-born, fire accidents (females), sanyasi tendency, loss of children
nodes.norm_label: ketu malefic effect: mental worry, small pox/skin disease, enmity with co-born, fire accidents (females), sanyasi tendency, loss of children

nodes.label: Ketu in 12th from Moon: 12th is Moksha Sthana and Ketu is significator of spirituality - native experiences self-realisation
nodes.norm_label: ketu in 12th from moon: 12th is moksha sthana and ketu is significator of spirituality - native experiences self-realisation

nodes.label: Gochara Vedha: a benefic transit's good results are CANCELLED when another planet sits in the specific Vedha house from Moon
nodes.source_location: Gochara Vedha and Vipareetha Vedha chapter
nodes.norm_label: gochara vedha: a benefic transit's good results are cancelled when another planet sits in the specific vedha house from moon

nodes.label: Vipareetha (Viloma) Vedha: a malefic transit's bad results are CANCELLED/NULLIFIED when another planet sits in the specific opposite house from Moon
nodes.source_location: Gochara Vedha and Vipareetha Vedha chapter
nodes.norm_label: vipareetha (viloma) vedha: a malefic transit's bad results are cancelled/nullified when another planet sits in the specific opposite house from moon

nodes.label: Sun Gochara Vedha pairs (benefic->Vedha): 3<->9, 6<->12, 10<->4, 11<->5; NO Vedha to Sun by Saturn
nodes.norm_label: sun gochara vedha pairs (benefic->vedha): 3<->9, 6<->12, 10<->4, 11<->5; no vedha to sun by saturn

nodes.label: Moon Gochara Vedha pairs: 1<->5, 3<->9, 6<->12, 7<->2, 10<->4, 11<->8; NO Vedha to Moon by Mercury
nodes.norm_label: moon gochara vedha pairs: 1<->5, 3<->9, 6<->12, 7<->2, 10<->4, 11<->8; no vedha to moon by mercury

nodes.label: Mercury Gochara Vedha pairs: 2<->5, 4<->3, 6<->9, 8<->1, 10<->8, 11<->12; NO Vedha to Mercury by Moon
nodes.norm_label: mercury gochara vedha pairs: 2<->5, 4<->3, 6<->9, 8<->1, 10<->8, 11<->12; no vedha to mercury by moon

nodes.label: Venus Gochara Vedha pairs (benefic->Vedha): 1<->8, 2<->7, 3<->1, 4<->10, 5<->9, 8<->5, 9<->11, 11<->3, 12<->6; NO Vedha to Venus by Sun
nodes.norm_label: venus gochara vedha pairs (benefic->vedha): 1<->8, 2<->7, 3<->1, 4<->10, 5<->9, 8<->5, 9<->11, 11<->3, 12<->6; no vedha to venus by sun

nodes.label: Saturn/Rahu/Ketu Gochara Vedha pairs (shared): 3<->12, 6<->9, 11<->5; NO Vedha to Saturn by Sun
nodes.norm_label: saturn/rahu/ketu gochara vedha pairs (shared): 3<->12, 6<->9, 11<->5; no vedha to saturn by sun

nodes.label: Nakshatra Vedha: transit effects through stars neutralised by a planet occupying a specified Nakshatra counted from natal planet's star (16 positions)
nodes.norm_label: nakshatra vedha: transit effects through stars neutralised by a planet occupying a specified nakshatra counted from natal planet's star (16 positions)

nodes.label: Ashtakavarga Phala: separate branch used for reconciliation of Gochara Phala (a planet may pass through its own bindus)
nodes.norm_label: ashtakavarga phala: separate branch used for reconciliation of gochara phala (a planet may pass through its own bindus)

nodes.label: Moorthi Nirnaya: method based on position of transit Moon from natal Moon when a planet enters a new sign
nodes.source_location: Transit Stellar Occupational Results / Moorthi Nirnaya
nodes.norm_label: moorthi nirnaya: method based on position of transit moon from natal moon when a planet enters a new sign

nodes.label: Tripataka Chakra: table identifying three planets ruling each year in the 108-year life cycle
nodes.norm_label: tripataka chakra: table identifying three planets ruling each year in the 108-year life cycle

nodes.label: Paryaya (cycle): one full transit cycle of Jupiter or Saturn; results vary by age/cycle (Desh-Kaal-Patra)
nodes.norm_label: paryaya (cycle): one full transit cycle of jupiter or saturn; results vary by age/cycle (desh-kaal-patra)

nodes.label: Paksha rule: transit results given separately for Shukla Paksha (waxing) and Krishna Paksha (waning); malefics strong in Krishna Paksha, benefics in Shukla Paksha
nodes.norm_label: paksha rule: transit results given separately for shukla paksha (waxing) and krishna paksha (waning); malefics strong in krishna paksha, benefics in shukla paksha

nodes.label: Latta (Puro/forward & Prustha/rear): star afflicted by counting specific stars from a planet's star; Latta over natal star gives sickness/ruin/death/difficulties
nodes.norm_label: latta (puro/forward & prustha/rear): star afflicted by counting specific stars from a planet's star; latta over natal star gives sickness/ruin/death/difficulties

nodes.label: Retrograde rule: retrograde benefic in favourable position intensifies good; retrograde malefic in favourable position neutralises good; stationary planets radiate strong energy
nodes.norm_label: retrograde rule: retrograde benefic in favourable position intensifies good; retrograde malefic in favourable position neutralises good; stationary planets radiate strong energy

nodes.label: Dignity rule: planet in exaltation/own/friendly sign gives good even in a bad house from Moon; in debilitation/enemy sign reduces benefic and intensifies malefic results
nodes.norm_label: dignity rule: planet in exaltation/own/friendly sign gives good even in a bad house from moon; in debilitation/enemy sign reduces benefic and intensifies malefic results

nodes.label: Mrityubhaga: fatal degrees in each Rasi; malefic transit + maraka dasa + planet in Mrityubhaga raises probability of death
nodes.norm_label: mrityubhaga: fatal degrees in each rasi; malefic transit + maraka dasa + planet in mrityubhaga raises probability of death

nodes.label: Maraka Dasa: death-dealing dasa period; when coinciding with malefic transit and completed life span, danger to life / death
nodes.norm_label: maraka dasa: death-dealing dasa period; when coinciding with malefic transit and completed life span, danger to life / death

nodes.label: Dasha Bhukti: time-distribution from birth star; weighed together with transit (both reckoned from Moon)
nodes.norm_label: dasha bhukti: time-distribution from birth star; weighed together with transit (both reckoned from moon)

nodes.label: Bodhaka/Vedhaka/Poshaka/Karaka: dasa-of-planet classification (Vedhaka dasa obstructs Bodhaka dasa); Rahu/Ketu do not act as these
nodes.source_location: Bodhaka, Vedhaka, Poshaka and Karaka chapter
nodes.norm_label: bodhaka/vedhaka/poshaka/karaka: dasa-of-planet classification (vedhaka dasa obstructs bodhaka dasa); rahu/ketu do not act as these

nodes.label: Tithi-Shoonya and Gochara: net transit result gets cancelled when transit coincides with a Tithi-Shoonya sign from Moon
nodes.norm_label: tithi-shoonya and gochara: net transit result gets cancelled when transit coincides with a tithi-shoonya sign from moon

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: wealth / income / gains / financial improvement

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: disease / ill-health / bodily affliction

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: quarrel / conflict / enmity / litigation / imprisonment

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: victory over enemies / success over opponents

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: status / promotion in job / honour / fame

nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: spouse / marriage / family / children outcomes

nodes.label: Life-area effect: danger to life / death (with Maraka) - severe outcome
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: danger to life / death (with maraka) - severe outcome

nodes.label: Life-area effect: spirituality / devotion / self-realisation / pilgrimage
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: spirituality / devotion / self-realisation / pilgrimage

nodes.label: Life-area effect: comforts / delicious food / vehicles / luxuries
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: comforts / delicious food / vehicles / luxuries

nodes.label: Life-area effect: birth of child / progeny gain (or Putra Dosha / loss of child when malefic)
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: birth of child / progeny gain (or putra dosha / loss of child when malefic)

nodes.label: Life-area effect: instant Raja Yoga / aristocratic status & elevation
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: instant raja yoga / aristocratic status & elevation

nodes.label: Life-area effect: black magic / undiagnosable disease / occult affliction (Rahu/Ketu)
nodes.norm_label: life-area effect: black magic / undiagnosable disease / occult affliction (rahu/ketu)

nodes.label: Source-conflict rule: where Sanskrit (Brihat Samhita) and ancient Tamil texts (Sundarananda/Jothida Kalanjiyam) disagree on a transit result, author favours Tamil reading
nodes.norm_label: source-conflict rule: where sanskrit (brihat samhita) and ancient tamil texts (sundarananda/jothida kalanjiyam) disagree on a transit result, author favours tamil reading

nodes.label: Mars in 9th from Moon: Tamil (Jothisha Kalanjiyam) gives good (clothes, marriage, child), Sanskrit gives bad (loss of respect, weakness)
nodes.norm_label: mars in 9th from moon: tamil (jothisha kalanjiyam) gives good (clothes, marriage, child), sanskrit gives bad (loss of respect, weakness)

nodes.label: Sun in 8th from Moon gives Putra Dosha (lack of progeny), danger to life, head/eye disease, funerals
nodes.norm_label: sun in 8th from moon gives putra dosha (lack of progeny), danger to life, head/eye disease, funerals

nodes.label: Beginning a New Habit or Routine (Nava-Arambha)
nodes.norm_label: beginning a new habit or routine (nava-arambha)

nodes.label: Sun (Surya)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Blood-red, square body, honey coloured eyes, bilious, intelligent, manly, limited hair

nodes.label: Moon (Chandra)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Very windy and phlegmatic, round body, learned, auspicious looks, sweet speech, fickleminded, very lustful

nodes.label: Mars (Kuja/Mangal)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Cruel, blood-red eyes, fickleminded, liberal hearted, bilious, thin waist

nodes.label: Mercury (Budha)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Attractive physique, ability to make pun, sense of humour, blend of all three humours

nodes.label: Jupiter (Guru/Brihaspati)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Large bodied, honey coloured eyes and hair, phlegmatic, intelligent, learned in all Shastras

nodes.label: Venus (Shukra)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Joyful, charming physique, beautiful brilliant eyes, poet, phlegmatic and windy, curly hair

nodes.label: Saturn (Shani)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Emaciated and long physique, honey coloured eyes, windy, big teeth, indolent, lame, coarse hair

nodes.label: Rahu (North Node)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.description: Smoke-like blue body, lives in forests, horrible, windy temperament, intelligent

nodes.label: Gajakeshari Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Jupiter in angle (Kendra) from Ascendant or Moon, aspected by benefic, not debilitated/combust/inimical
nodes.effects: Splendorous, wealthy, intelligent, endowed with many virtues, favourite of the King

nodes.label: Amala Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 10th house from Ascendant or Moon occupied exclusively by benefics
nodes.effects: Enduring fame, honoured by King, abundant pleasures, charitable, helpful, pious, virtuous

nodes.label: Parvata Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 7th and 8th Houses empty or occupied by benefics only, AND angles occupied by benefics
nodes.effects: Fortunate, eloquent, charitable, learned, fond of mirth, splendorous, leader of city

nodes.label: Kahala Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and Jupiter in mutual angles with Ascendant Lord strong; OR 4th Lord in own/exaltation sign conjunct 10th Lord
nodes.effects: Energetic, courageous, crafty, chief of four armies, lord of villages

nodes.label: Chamara Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord in exaltation in angle aspected by Jupiter; OR two benefics in Ascendant and 9th, or 10th and 7th
nodes.effects: King or honoured by King, long lived, scholarly, eloquent, well versed in all arts

nodes.label: Sankha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord strong AND 5th and 6th Lords in mutual angles; OR 9th Lord strong with Ascendant Lord and 10th Lord in movable signs
nodes.effects: Endowed with wealth, wife and sons, kindly nature, propitious, intelligent, virtuous, long-lived

nodes.label: Bheri Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord strong AND all planets in 1st, 2nd, 7th and 12th Houses; OR Venus, Jupiter and Ascendant Lord in angles with 9th Lord strong
nodes.effects: Wealthy, endowed with wife and sons, King, famous, virtuous, good mannered, happy

nodes.label: Mridanga Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord strong AND other planets in exaltation or own signs in angles or trines
nodes.effects: King or happy like a King

nodes.label: Shrinatha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 7th Lord in exaltation in 10th House AND 10th Lord conjunct 9th Lord
nodes.effects: King equal to Indra, God of Gods

nodes.label: Sharada Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 10th Lord in 5th House with Mercury in angle and Sun in own sign; OR Jupiter/Mercury in trine from Moon with Mars in 11th
nodes.effects: Wealth, wife and sons, happy, scholarly, honoured by King, pious and virtuous

nodes.label: Matsya Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Benefics in 9th and Ascendant, mixed planets in 5th, malefics in 4th and 8th
nodes.effects: Astrologer, kindness incarnate, virtuous, intelligent, strong, beautiful, famous, learned, pious

nodes.label: Koorma Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 5th, 6th and 7th occupied by benefics in own/exaltation/friendly signs AND 3rd, 11th and Ascendant occupied by malefics in own/exaltation signs
nodes.effects: King, courageous, virtuous, famous, helpful, happy, leader of men

nodes.label: Khadaga Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord in 2nd House, 2nd Lord in 9th House, Ascendant Lord in angle or trine
nodes.effects: Endowed with wealth, fortunes and happiness, learned, gifted with intelligence and strength, grateful and skillful

nodes.label: Lakshmi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord in own/exaltation/mooltrikona sign in angle, Ascendant Lord strong
nodes.effects: Charming, virtuous, King, many sons, abundant wealth, famous, high moral merits

nodes.label: Kusuma Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Movable sign in Ascendant, Venus in angle, Moon in trine with benefic, Saturn in 10th
nodes.effects: King or equal to King, charitable, enjoys pleasures, happy, prime in family, virtuous, man of letters

nodes.label: Kalanidhi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Jupiter conjunct or aspected by Venus and Mercury in 2nd or 5th House; OR Jupiter in signs of Venus or Mercury
nodes.effects: Virtuous, honoured by King, free from disease, happy, endowed with wealth and learning

nodes.label: Kalpadruma (Parijata) Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord, Lord of that sign, Lord of that sign's Lord, and Navamsha Lord — all in angles or trines or exaltation
nodes.effects: All kinds of wealth, King, pious, strong, fond of war, merciful

nodes.label: Maharaja Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Exchange between Ascendant Lord and 5th Lord AND Atmakaraka and Putrakaraka in Ascendant or 5th, in exaltation/Navamsha/own sign, aspected by benefic
nodes.effects: Famous, happy, and regal

nodes.label: Raja Yoga (Generic)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Angular Lord (1/4/7/10) in relation with Trinal Lord (1/5/9) by conjunction, aspect, or exchange
nodes.effects: Royal status, power, authority, recognition

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 9th and 10th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 9th Lord and 10th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: Strongest Raja Yoga; native gets government post of very high level, material achievements, honour and fame

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 4th and 5th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and 5th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: Education, popularity, art, social understanding, property purchases, high government post

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — 4th and 9th Lord Conjunction
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 4th Lord and 9th Lord in conjunction
nodes.effects: God-loving, devoted, all pleasures and wealth without effort, famous, great public following

nodes.label: Viparita Raja Yoga (type)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: 6th, 8th and 3rd Houses occupied by debilitated planets AND Ascendant Lord in own/exaltation sign aspecting Ascendant; OR Lords of 6th, 8th, 12th debilitated/combust/in enemy sign
nodes.effects: Rajayoga — power and recognition despite adversities

nodes.label: Adhi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Benefics in 6th, 7th and 8th Houses from the Moon
nodes.effects: King, minister, or army chief depending on strength of planets

nodes.label: Dhana Yoga (from Moon)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: All benefics in Upachaya Houses (3rd, 6th, 10th, 11th) from the Moon
nodes.effects: Very affluent

nodes.label: Sunapha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Any planet other than Sun in the 2nd House from the Moon
nodes.effects: King or equal, intelligent, wealthy, famous, self-earned wealth

nodes.label: Anapha Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Any planet other than Sun in the 12th House from the Moon
nodes.effects: King, free from diseases, virtuous, famous, charming, every kind of happiness

nodes.label: Duradhura Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Planets other than Sun in both 2nd and 12th Houses from the Moon
nodes.effects: All pleasures, charitable, endowed with wealth and conveyances, excellent servants

nodes.label: Kemadruma Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: No planet (except Sun) in 2nd or 12th from Moon AND no planet in angle from Ascendant
nodes.effects: Disgraced, devoid of intelligence and learning, penury and calamities

nodes.label: Vesi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Any planet (except Moon) in 2nd House from the Sun
nodes.effects: Even sighted, truthful, long bodied, lazy, happy, little wealth

nodes.label: Vosi Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Any planet (except Moon) in 12th House from the Sun
nodes.effects: Skillful, charitable, endowed with fame, learning and strength

nodes.label: Ubhayachari Yoga
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Planets (except Moon) in both 2nd and 12th Houses from the Sun
nodes.effects: King or equal to King, happy

nodes.label: Yoga Karaka Planet Principle
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: A single planet that is both an angular lord (1/4/7/10) and a trinal lord (5/9) simultaneously
nodes.effects: That planet alone becomes a Yoga Karaka — capable of producing Raja Yoga results independently

nodes.label: Kendradhipati Dosha
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, full Moon) owning angular houses lose their benefic nature
nodes.effects: Does not give auspicious effects purely by virtue of being natural benefic and angular lord

nodes.label: Trishadaya Lords — Malefic Principle
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Lords of 3rd, 6th, 11th Houses are inauspicious regardless of natural nature
nodes.effects: Give inauspicious effects in their Dasa periods

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga (Cancellation of Debilitation)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Strong Jupiter aspecting debilitated Moon (example given); various conditions cancel debilitation
nodes.effects: Cancels debilitation; debilitated planet gains strength; can produce Rajayoga

nodes.label: Yoga Karaka for Aries — None (Sun and Jupiter are benefics)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.yoga_karaka: None identified — Mars helps other auspicious planets
nodes.norm_label: yoga karaka for aries — none (sun and jupiter are benefics)

nodes.label: Yoga Karaka for Cancer — Mars
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.yoga_karaka: Mars (4th and 5th lord — full Yoga Karaka)

nodes.label: Yoga Karaka for Virgo — Mercury and Venus
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.yoga_karaka: Mercury and Venus (both are Yoga Karakas)
nodes.norm_label: yoga karaka for virgo — mercury and venus

nodes.label: Yoga Karaka for Libra — Saturn and Mercury
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.yoga_karaka: Saturn (4th and 5th lord), Moon and Mercury as Raja Yoga Karakas
nodes.norm_label: yoga karaka for libra — saturn and mercury

house_meanings.1: physique, appearance, intellect, complexion, vigour, joy, sorrow, innate nature
house_meanings.2: wealth, grains, family, enemies, metals, precious stones
house_meanings.3: valour, servants, brothers and sisters, journeys, parents death
house_meanings.4: conveyance, relatives, mother, happiness, treasure, lands, houses
house_meanings.5: amulets, sacred spells, learning, intellect, sons, management
house_meanings.6: maternal uncle, enemies, ulcers, step mother
house_meanings.8: longevity, battle, enemies, forts, wealth of dead, past/future life knowledge
house_meanings.10: royalty, profession, honour, father, foreign travel
house_meanings.11: receipt of articles, son's wife, income, prosperity, quadrupeds

nodes.label: Benefic/Malefic Yoga in Ascendant
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Benefic only in Ascendant = auspicious yoga; malefic only in Ascendant = inauspicious yoga; same applies to 2nd and 12th houses
nodes.effects_inauspicious: Sensual, sinful acts, usurper of others wealth

nodes.label: Rahu and Ketu Behavioral Principle
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Rahu and Ketu give effects predominantly of the planet they conjoin, or of the house they occupy if alone
nodes.effects: They intensify and multiply the effects of their conjunct planet twofold

nodes.label: Natural Planetary Relationships (Naisargika Maitri)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Lords of 4th, 2nd, 12th, 5th, 9th, 8th from Mooltrikona sign and lord of exaltation sign = friends; others = enemies; mixed = neutral
nodes.compound_relationships: Natural+Temporary Friend = Extreme Friend; Natural Friend+Temporary Neutral = Friend; Natural Enemy+Temporary Enemy = Extreme Enemy

nodes.label: Exaltation / Own Sign Strength Ratios
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Planet in exaltation = 100% effect; in own sign = 50%; in friendly sign = 25%

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — Angular and Trinal Lord Relation
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Lord of angle (1/4/7/10) in mutual relation (conjunction/aspect/exchange) with lord of trine (5/9)
nodes.effects: King or royal status; strongest when 9th and 10th lords are related
nodes.norm_label: raja yoga — angular and trinal lord relation

nodes.label: Raja Yoga — Exalted Planets
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Less than 3 exalted planets = royal birth native is king; 4-5 exalted = even base born is king; 6 exalted = Chakravarti (universal ruler)
nodes.effects: Kingship proportional to number of exalted planets

nodes.label: House Lord Placement Principle
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: House lord in 6/8/12 destroys effects of that house; house lord in Kendra or Trikona promotes effects
nodes.effects: Universal rule applicable to all 12 houses

nodes.label: Jupiter in Kendra — Antidote to Evils
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Even one of Mercury, Jupiter, Venus in a Kendra from Ascendant destroys all evils; strong Jupiter alone in Ascendant destroys all evils
nodes.effects: Destroys all evils and arishtas
nodes.norm_label: jupiter in kendra — antidote to evils

nodes.label: Moon-Based Kendra Yoga (Chandra Lagna)
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Moon acts as an Ascendant (Chandra Lagna); all yogas can be evaluated from Moon as well as from natal Ascendant
nodes.effects: Yogas from Moon Ascendant give parallel results to natal Ascendant yogas

nodes.label: Planet in Trik Houses (6/8/12) — Weakness
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Planet in 6th, 8th or 12th: if a house lord, destroys the house; combustion, enemy sign, or debilitation also destroys house effects
nodes.effects: House significations fail; negative results for that life area

nodes.label: Dhana Yoga — Venus in 5th Own Sign with Mars in 11th
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Venus in own sign (Taurus or Libra) in 5th House, Mars in 11th House
nodes.effects: Possesses great riches
nodes.norm_label: dhana yoga — venus in 5th own sign with mars in 11th

nodes.label: Dhana Yoga — Mercury in 5th Own Sign with Moon/Mars/Jupiter in 11th
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Mercury in own sign in 5th House, Moon, Mars and Jupiter in 11th House
nodes.effects: Extremely wealthy
nodes.norm_label: dhana yoga — mercury in 5th own sign with moon/mars/jupiter in 11th

nodes.label: Strong Ascendant Lord — Foundation of Wellbeing
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Ascendant Lord in Kendra or Trikona = long life, wealth, intelligence, royal favour; Ascendant Lord in movable sign aspected by benefic = fame, wealth, pleasures
nodes.effects: Physical health, longevity, and prosperity
nodes.norm_label: strong ascendant lord — foundation of wellbeing

nodes.label: Mercury — Malefic by Association
nodes.author: Maharshi Parasara
nodes.formation: Mercury when conjunct a malefic planet becomes a malefic; otherwise benefic; if conjunct both types, gives mixed results
nodes.effects: Mercury's nature is determined by association

nodes.label: Ruchaka Yoga (Mars in own/exaltation in Kendra)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: ruchaka yoga (mars in own/exaltation in kendra)

nodes.label: Bhadra Yoga (Mercury in own/exaltation in Kendra)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: bhadra yoga (mercury in own/exaltation in kendra)

nodes.label: Hamsa Yoga (Jupiter in own/exaltation in Kendra)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: hamsa yoga (jupiter in own/exaltation in kendra)

nodes.label: Malavya Yoga (Venus in own/exaltation in Kendra)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: malavya yoga (venus in own/exaltation in kendra)

nodes.label: Shasha Yoga (Saturn in own/exaltation in Kendra)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: shasha yoga (saturn in own/exaltation in kendra)

nodes.label: Kesari Yoga (Moon in Kendra from Jupiter)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: kesari yoga (moon in kendra from jupiter)

nodes.label: Durudhara Yoga (planets in both 2nd and 12th from Moon)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: durudhara yoga (planets in both 2nd and 12th from moon)

nodes.label: Vasumati Yoga (benefics in Upachaya houses from Lagna/Moon)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: vasumati yoga (benefics in upachaya houses from lagna/moon)

nodes.label: Lakshmi Yoga (Venus and 9th lord in own/exaltation in Kendra/Trikona)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: lakshmi yoga (venus and 9th lord in own/exaltation in kendra/trikona)

nodes.label: Saraswati Yoga (Mercury, Jupiter, Venus in Kendra/Trikona/2nd; Jupiter strong)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: saraswati yoga (mercury, jupiter, venus in kendra/trikona/2nd; jupiter strong)

nodes.label: Adhiyoga (benefics in 6th, 7th, 8th from Lagna or Moon)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: adhiyoga (benefics in 6th, 7th, 8th from lagna or moon)

nodes.label: Viparita Raja Yoga (lords of 6th/8th/12th in each other's houses)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: viparita raja yoga (lords of 6th/8th/12th in each other's houses)

nodes.label: Raja Yoga (lords of 9th and 10th conjoined in auspicious house)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: raja yoga (lords of 9th and 10th conjoined in auspicious house)

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga (cancellation of debilitation giving kingship)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: neecha bhanga raja yoga (cancellation of debilitation giving kingship)

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga Type 1: Lord of depression sign or exaltation-sign lord in Kendra from Lagna/Moon
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: neecha bhanga type 1: lord of depression sign or exaltation-sign lord in kendra from lagna/moon

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga Type 2: Lord of depression sign and exaltation sign lord mutually in Kendra
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: neecha bhanga type 2: lord of depression sign and exaltation sign lord mutually in kendra

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga Type 3: Planet in debilitation aspected by lord of that sign
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: neecha bhanga type 3: planet in debilitation aspected by lord of that sign

nodes.label: Neecha Bhanga Type 4: Debilitated planet in Kendra from Lagna or Moon
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: neecha bhanga type 4: debilitated planet in kendra from lagna or moon

nodes.label: Yogakaraka (planet owning both a Kendra and a Trikona)
nodes.source_location: Chapter 20, Sloka 54 and notes on verse 47
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka (planet owning both a kendra and a trikona)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Taurus Ascendant: Saturn (lord of 9th and 10th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for taurus ascendant: saturn (lord of 9th and 10th)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Cancer Ascendant: Mars (lord of 5th and 10th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for cancer ascendant: mars (lord of 5th and 10th)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Leo Ascendant: Mars (lord of 4th and 9th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for leo ascendant: mars (lord of 4th and 9th)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Libra Ascendant: Saturn (lord of 4th and 5th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for libra ascendant: saturn (lord of 4th and 5th)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Capricorn Ascendant: Venus (lord of 5th and 10th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for capricorn ascendant: venus (lord of 5th and 10th)

nodes.label: Yogakaraka for Aquarius Ascendant: Venus (lord of 4th and 9th)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: yogakaraka for aquarius ascendant: venus (lord of 4th and 9th)

nodes.label: Ashtakavarga System (8-source benefic point tally for transit assessment)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: ashtakavarga system (8-source benefic point tally for transit assessment)

nodes.label: Sarvashtakavarga (sum of all 7 planetary Ashtakavargas; >28 bindus = auspicious transit)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: sarvashtakavarga (sum of all 7 planetary ashtakavargas; >28 bindus = auspicious transit)

nodes.label: Trikona Sodhana (rectification of Ashtakavarga by triangular groups)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: trikona sodhana (rectification of ashtakavarga by triangular groups)

nodes.label: Ekadhipatya Sodhana (Ashtakavarga rectification for dual-sign lords)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: ekadhipatya sodhana (ashtakavarga rectification for dual-sign lords)

nodes.label: Kendradhipati Dosha (natural benefics owning Kendras become weak/malefic)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: kendradhipati dosha (natural benefics owning kendras become weak/malefic)

nodes.label: Mahabhagya Yoga (day birth male with Lagna/Sun/Moon in odd signs; night birth female in even signs)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: mahabhagya yoga (day birth male with lagna/sun/moon in odd signs; night birth female in even signs)

nodes.label: Sakata Yoga (Moon in 6th/8th/12th from Jupiter; cancelled if Moon in Kendra from Lagna)
nodes.author: Mantreswara
nodes.norm_label: sakata yoga (moon in 6th/8th/12th from jupiter; cancelled if moon in kendra from lagna)

links.source_location: Jyothish Kalangiam: Sun good even in bad house if exalted/own
No Vedha by Sun to Venus
Moon Janma Rasi = instant Raja Yoga
Kujavah Ketu - Ketu results based on Mars
Mercury 8th = high standard of life (unusual benefic 8th)
No Vedha by Mercury to Moon
Venus Janma Rasi (Brihat Samhita - erotic comforts)
Sanivah Rahu - Rahu results based on Saturn
No Vedha by Saturn to Sun
Mercury 2nd: Tamil bad vs Brihat Samhita income
Janma Sani middle of Sade Sati
Jupiter in 3rd cancels Saturn 12th Sade Sati
Ketu spirituality both via 12th and Gnana Karaka nature
Latta of Jupiter over natal star may give death
Recurring: danger to life if Maraka runs
Chapter 6, verse 33-35 notes, p.80-81 (Parasara contradicts Mantreswara on Harsha/Sarala/Vimala)

hyperedges.label: Gajakeshari Yoga Formation Condition
Kalanidhi Yoga — Jupiter-Venus-Mercury Trio
Strongest Raja Yoga — 9th and 10th Lord Conjunction
Sunapha-Anapha-Duradhura Lunar Yoga Triad
Vesi-Vosi-Ubhayachari Solar Yoga Triad
Shrinatha Yoga — 7th Lord Exalted in 10th with 9th-10th Conjunction
Cancer Ascendant — Mars as Full Yoga Karaka (4th and 5th Lord)
Taurus Ascendant — Saturn as Raja Yoga Karaka (9th and 10th Lord)
Nine-Planet Natural Friendship Network
Dhana Yoga — Venus in 5th own sign + Mars in 11th
Maharaja Yoga — Exchange + Karaka Combination
Koorma Yoga — Dual Condition for Benefics and Malefics
Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga Group: Five planets in own/exaltation in Kendra
Viparita Raja Yoga Cluster: Harsha + Sarala + Vimala (dusthana lords in dusthanas give excellent results per Mantreswara; Parasara disagrees)
Five Types of Neecha Bhanga Raja Yoga (Mantreswara Ch.7 vv.26-30)
Ascendant-Specific Yogakarakas: Saturn for Taurus/Libra, Mars for Cancer/Leo, Venus for Capricorn/Aquarius
Ashtakavarga System: Bindu accumulation, Trikona Sodhana, Ekadhipatya Sodhana, Sarvashtakavarga
